issues.description: Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. Card text says 'Set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active', which means activating resting DON!! cards, not giving new DON!!. Should use 'Rest' with a condition targeting resting DON!! cards, or a custom action for activation. 'GiveDon' adds DON!! to the leader, not activates existing ones.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.
